name: Hex Editor Fay
description: Allows viewing and editing files in a hex editor
hexeditorfay.inspectorType: Where the data inspector should be shown in the hex editor.
hexeditorfay.maxFileSize: The max file size (in MB) that the editor will try to open before warning you.
hexeditorfay.dataInspector.autoReveal: Whether to auto reveal the data inspector when the hex editor is opened.
hexeditorfay.defaultEndianness: The endianness selected when loading the editor.
hexeditorfay.columnWidth: The number of bytes per row to show in the editor.
hexeditorfay.showDecodedText: Whether decoded text should be shown in the editor.
hexeditorfay.showOpenFileButton: Show Hex Editor button in editor menu.
hexEditorFay.openFile: Open Active File in Hex Editor
hexeditorfay.copyType: Sets the default format in which bytes are copied
